name: ocas-praxis
description: Bounded behavioral refinement loop. Use when the system needs to record outcomes, extract micro-lessons from repeated patterns, consolidate them into active behavior shifts, apply shifts at runtime, and generate plain-language debriefs. Trigger phrases: 'what did we learn from that', 'show my active behavior shifts', 'generate a debrief', 'record this outcome'. Do not use for general memory, personality rewriting, or knowledge storage.
author: Indigo Karasu
